title: District Program Officer Balrampur Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
shortInfo: The latest District Program Officer Balrampur (DPO Balrampur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Anganwadi Worker posts! Published on 07 May 2026 at the official DPO Balrampur website, this new recruitment drive offers 40 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 35 years and possessing a minimum qualification of Intermediate or equivalent can apply online from 07 May 2026 to 28 May 2026. Find all details about the DPO Balrampur Anganwadi Worker 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

basic_details.job_title: District Program Officer Balrampur Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Program Officer Balrampur (DPO Balrampur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Anganwadi Worker posts! Published on 07 May 2026 at the official DPO Balrampur website, this new recruitment drive offers 40 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 35 years and possessing a minimum qualification of Intermediate or equivalent can apply online from 07 May 2026 to 28 May 2026. Find all details about the DPO Balrampur Anganwadi Worker 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Cut-off Date: 01-01-2026

qualification.details: Minimum Intermediate or equivalent (Merit prepared on basis of marks up to Postgraduate)

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Merit List (Educational qualification marks with priority to widows
abandoned women from local BPL families)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the District Program Officer Balrampur Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of District Program Officer Balrampur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Karyakarta post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Anganwadi Karyakarta post is 28-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for candidates applying for the Anganwadi Karyakarta post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01-01-2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Intermediate or an equivalent examination. The merit list will be prepared based on marks obtained up to the postgraduate level.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Karyakarta?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies for the Anganwadi Karyakarta post announced by the District Program Officer Balrampur.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Anganwadi Karyakarta recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Karyakarta position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a merit list prepared from the educational qualification marks. Priority will be given to widows, divorcees, and abandoned women from local BPL families.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Anganwadi Karyakarta recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Anganwadi Karyakarta position?
faq.answer: The Anganwadi Karyakarta positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Program Officer Balrampur in Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided.
